user.title: Connect to Powerwall
user.description: Enter the local gateway details. Find the gateway IP in your router's DHCP table or the Tesla app. The gateway password is the Wi-Fi password for the Tesla Gateway's own access point — it is printed on the QR label on the Tesla Energy Gateway unit (not the Powerwall battery unit), and is separate from the Powerwall's own Wi-Fi credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect — check the IP address and gateway password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Powerwall gateway is already configured.
